title: Ghost Protocol
learning_objectives: Analyze endpoint detection and response (EDR) capabilities
Develop evasion techniques for EDR bypass
Create obfuscated payloads resistant to detection
scenario: Scenario Target runs CrowdStrike Falcon (simulated). Standard payloads are instantly detected. Develop evasion capabilities achieving execution without detection. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA06, RA07 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.challenge: Evade endpoint detection on Pan-African logistics network's Cairo, Egypt systems
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Detection Analysis
subtasks.description: Submit standard payloads. Document what gets detected and why.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Custom Shellcode Loader
subtasks.detailed_guidance:

subtasks.title: Obfuscation Layer
subtasks.description: Encryption and runtime decryption for payload delivery.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:

subtasks.detailed_guidance:

quiz.question: What does AMSI primarily detect?
options: Malicious behavior in PowerShell and other Windows scripting engines
quiz.explanation: AMSI (Antimalware Scan Interface) detects malicious scripts in PowerShell and VBScript by scanning behavior and code patterns.

quiz.question: Which of the following is a "living-off-the-land" technique?
options: Using exclusively external tools from the internet
Using built-in Windows tools like PowerShell and WMI without introducing new binaries
quiz.explanation: Living-off-the-land uses legitimate system tools to avoid introducing suspicious binaries that trigger detection.

mentor_notes: For OA-M05 - Ghost Protocol: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build evasion & anti-detection expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
